Keywords: kpi, metric, stat, value, delta, change, number, indicator
Description: Single stat with label value delta (arrow+%) and optional sparkline
Layout Pattern: Full-width card or 50% in 2-col grid
Do: Use semantic color for delta (green profit / red loss) with directional icon
Don't: Rely on color alone for positive/negative; cram multiple metrics into one card

Keywords: metric strip, horizontal scroll, stats row, summary bar
Description: Horizontal scroll row of mini stat cards showing key metrics at a glance
Layout Pattern: Top of dashboard above main content
Do: Keep to 4-6 cards max; use consistent card width
Don't: Overload with 10+ cards; mix card sizes randomly
Tamagui: XStack + ScrollView horizontal + gap="$3" + Card items

Keywords: summary, header, hero metric, primary stat, dashboard title
Description: Large primary metric with subtitle and optional gradient background
Layout Pattern: Top of screen fixed or scroll-away
Do: Make the primary number the largest text element; pair with period selector
Don't: Crowd with too many secondary stats; use heavy gradients that hurt readability
Tamagui: YStack + H2 (primary value) + SizableText (subtitle) + LinearGradient wrapper

Keywords: data table, sortable, rows, columns, grid, tabular
Description: Sortable rows with column headers and horizontal scroll for overflow
Layout Pattern: Full-width within a card or standalone section
Do: Enable horizontal scroll for many columns; highlight sorted column; use monospace for numbers
Don't: Force all columns to fit screen width; truncate important data
Tamagui: Custom XStack/YStack grid + horizontal ScrollView + SizableText

Keywords: sparkline, mini chart, inline chart, cell chart, trend indicator
Description: Inline mini chart within a list row or table cell showing trend at a glance
Layout Pattern: Inline within a list row trailing area or table cell
Do: Keep height 24-32px; no axes/labels (pure shape); use single color
Don't: Make sparkline interactive (too small for touch); add axes or labels
Tamagui: Inline within ListItem iconAfter area; use chart-kit with height={24} width={60}
Paper: Inline within DataTable.Cell; chart-kit LineChart mini
Chart Library: react-native-chart-kit LineChart (no labels no grid bezier)

Keywords: status, badge, dot, indicator, connection, online, offline
Description: Connection or market status dot with label (online/offline/open/closed)
Layout Pattern: Inside header or appbar; inline with title
Do: Use semantic colors (green=active red=error amber=warning); keep dot size 8-12px
Don't: Use badge for decoration without meaning; mix badge sizes inconsistently
Paper: Badge (visible size={8}) + Text; or custom dot View

Keywords: avatar, group, stacked, users, participants, team
Description: Stacked user avatars with overlap effect showing team or participants
Layout Pattern: Inline within a card header or list item
Do: Limit to 3-4 visible + +N more overflow; consistent size
Don't: Show more than 5 avatars stacked (visual clutter); use without fallback initials
Tamagui: Avatar (circular) in XStack with marginLeft={-8} per item + Avatar.Fallback
GlueStack: Avatar stacked in HStack with ml={-8}

Keywords: animated counter, number transition, rolling number, value change
Description: Number that transitions smoothly from old to new value on data update
Layout Pattern: Within KPI cards or summary headers
Do: Use Reanimated withTiming (300ms) or withSpring for natural feel; format with Intl.NumberFormat
Don't: Snap numbers instantly (jarring); animate on every minor fluctuation (use threshold)

Keywords: real-time, ticker, live price, websocket, flash, price update
Description: Live value display with flash-on-change color animation for real-time data
Layout Pattern: Fixed bar at top or within metric strip
Do: Throttle WebSocket updates to 250ms min; flash green on increase red on decrease briefly (200ms)
Don't: Re-render entire screen per tick; leave flash color permanently; no stale data indicator
Tamagui: XStack + animated SizableText + useAnimatedStyle for color flash + useRef for latest value
Paper: Surface + animated Text + useAnimatedStyle for flash

Keywords: list item, row, icon, title, subtitle, trailing, chevron
Description: Standard list row with icon + title + subtitle + trailing value/chevron
Layout Pattern: Within FlatList or ScrollView for dashboard sections
Do: Consistent height (56-72px); tap target full row width; trailing text right-aligned
Don't: Mix row heights; use tiny tap targets on trailing icons only

Keywords: progress, ring, circular, completion, target, radial
Description: Circular progress ring for completion or target visualization
Layout Pattern: Within a card; often paired with center label text
Do: Show percentage in center; use semantic color (green complete amber partial red behind)
Don't: Use for values that don't represent progress (misleading); animate continuously when not loading
Tamagui: Progress component (linear only - use chart-kit for circular)
Paper: ProgressBar (linear only - use chart-kit ProgressChart for circular)

Keywords: notification, alert, warning, info, card, message, severity
Description: Alert card with colored left border indicating severity level
Layout Pattern: Stacked in notification list or pinned at top of dashboard
Do: Use 4px left border with semantic color; include dismiss action; show timestamp
Don't: Use background fill color for entire card (overwhelming); no dismiss option
Paper: Card mode=outlined + style borderLeftWidth/Color + Card.Content + Text

Keywords: line chart, trend, time series, chart card
Description: Trend line visualization wrapped in a dashboard card
Layout Pattern: Full-width card or 2-col grid item
Do: Pass theme tokens to chartConfig; show axes labels; add loading skeleton while fetching
Don't: Hardcode colors outside theme; leave chart unstyled against card background
Chart Library: react-native-chart-kit LineChart; victory-native VictoryLine; react-native-gifted-charts LineChart

Keywords: bar chart, comparison, categories, bar graph
Description: Category comparison bar chart wrapped in a dashboard card
Layout Pattern: Full-width card or 2-col grid item
Do: Sort bars by value descending; show value labels; horizontal bars for long labels
Don't: Cram 15+ bars without scroll; use random unsorted order

Keywords: pie chart, donut, allocation, proportion, share
Description: Allocation or proportion display with optional center label
Layout Pattern: Within a card; often half-width in 2-col grid
Do: Max 5 slices; show percentage labels; use donut with center total value
Don't: Use for 6+ categories (switch to bar); use similar colors for adjacent slices
Tamagui: Card (YStack padding="$3" alignItems="center") + center overlay ZStack for label
Paper: Card + Card.Content + center overlay for label
Chart Library: react-native-gifted-charts PieChart (donut mode isDonut={true}); react-native-chart-kit PieChart

Keywords: candlestick, ohlc, financial, stock, trading, price chart
Description: OHLCV financial chart with crosshair on long-press for trading dashboards
Layout Pattern: Full-width card; often primary dashboard widget
Do: Enable pinch-zoom and pan; show crosshair with OHLCV values on long-press; haptic feedback
Don't: Disable zoom on financial charts; use static candlestick without interaction
Tamagui: Card (YStack padding="$3") + Sheet for drill-down detail

Keywords: gauge, meter, semi-circle, dial, performance, risk
Description: Semi-circle gauge for performance or risk level indicator
Layout Pattern: Within a card; often 50% width in grid
Do: Animate needle smoothly on value change; show min/max labels; color zones (green/amber/red)
Don't: Use full circle (confusing); skip min/max labels; static without animation

Keywords: heatmap, matrix, grid, intensity, correlation, activity
Description: Color-intensity grid showing activity or correlation patterns
Layout Pattern: Full-width card
Do: Use sequential color scale (light to dark); show value on tap; label axes
Don't: Use diverging colors for non-diverging data; make cells too small to tap (min 44px)
Tamagui: Card (YStack padding="$3") + XStack/YStack grid of colored Views

Keywords: radar, spider, multi-axis, comparison, skill
Description: Multi-axis comparison chart for comparing entities across dimensions
Layout Pattern: Within a card; 50% width in grid or full-width
Do: Max 6-8 axes; fill with low opacity (0.2); overlay 2 datasets max for comparison
Don't: Use 10+ axes (unreadable); skip axis labels; use without legend for multiple datasets

Keywords: segmented, time control, timeframe, period, 1H 4H 1D 1W
Description: Timeframe switcher (1H/4H/1D/1W/1M) for chart time periods
Layout Pattern: Directly above a chart widget or in a dashboard header
Do: Highlight active segment clearly; keep 3-5 options max; persist selection across sessions
Don't: Use dropdown for time selection (too many taps); show more than 6 segments
Tamagui: Tabs + Tabs.List + Tabs.Trigger (value per timeframe) + compact styling

Keywords: tab, dashboard tabs, sections, overview, positions, history
Description: Tab-organized dashboard sections for multi-view dashboards
Layout Pattern: Top-level navigation pattern; tabs at top or bottom
Do: Max 5 tabs; use icon + label; lazy-render off-screen tabs with React.memo
Don't: Use tabs for 2 sections (use toggle instead); nest tabs within tabs

Keywords: search, filter, find, query, dashboard search
Description: Dashboard data search and filtering input
Layout Pattern: Top of dashboard or within a section header
Do: Debounce search input (300ms); show clear button; persist filter state on tab switch
Don't: Search on every keystroke (expensive); hide search behind menu
Paper: Searchbar (mode="bar" placeholder value onChangeText icon onClearIconPress)

Keywords: chip, tag, filter, multi-select, category, toggle
Description: Multi-select filter pills for category or status filtering
Layout Pattern: Below search bar or above a data list
Do: Use horizontal ScrollView for many chips; show selected count; clear-all option
Don't: Stack chips vertically (wastes space); no visual distinction between selected/unselected
Tamagui: styled Pressable in XStack (horizontal ScrollView) with selected state background
Paper: Chip (compact selected icon onPress) in ScrollView horizontal
GlueStack: Badge variant=solid/outline per state in HStack

Keywords: collapsible, accordion, expandable, section, grouped
Description: Expandable section header for grouping related dashboard metrics
Layout Pattern: Full-width; stack vertically for grouped data
Do: Animate expand/collapse (200ms); keep header always visible; show item count in header
Don't: Start all collapsed (user sees nothing); no visual cue for expandability (add chevron)
Tamagui: Custom animated YStack with height animation + Pressable header + ChevronDown icon
Paper: List.Accordion (title left expanded onPress) + List.Item children

Keywords: swipeable, swipe action, delete, archive, pin, gesture
Description: Card with swipe-to-reveal actions (delete/archive/pin)
Layout Pattern: Within FlatList or ScrollView of dashboard cards
Do: Show action label + icon; use red for destructive; max 2 actions per side
Don't: Rely on swipe as only way to access actions (add overflow menu too); no visual hint of swipeability
Tamagui: react-native-gesture-handler Swipeable + Animated XStack for action panel
Paper: react-native-gesture-handler Swipeable + Surface for action panel
GlueStack: Actionsheet as alternative; Swipeable from gesture-handler

Keywords: bottom sheet, drill-down, detail, peek, expand, sheet
Description: Drill-down from card tap to full detail view in a bottom sheet
Layout Pattern: Triggered by card tap; overlays dashboard content
Do: Use snap points (30% peek / 80% full); include handle for affordance; support swipe-dismiss
Don't: Use full-screen navigate for every detail (breaks dashboard flow); no close affordance

Keywords: pull to refresh, refresh, reload, live data, update
Description: Pull-down gesture to refresh dashboard data
Layout Pattern: Wraps entire dashboard ScrollView or FlatList
Do: Show last-updated timestamp after refresh; use theme-colored spinner; debounce rapid pulls
Don't: Refresh without visual feedback; full-screen loading overlay on refresh (use inline)

Keywords: skeleton, shimmer, placeholder, loading, widget loading
Description: Shimmer placeholder matching widget shape while data loads
Layout Pattern: Replace each widget with its skeleton shape during loading
Do: Match skeleton to actual widget dimensions; use subtle shimmer animation; load widgets independently
Don't: Show single full-screen spinner; use generic rectangles that don't match widget shapes

Keywords: empty state, no data, zero state, first time, onboarding
Description: Helpful message with illustration and CTA when no data exists
Layout Pattern: Center of the widget or full dashboard area
Do: Include clear explanation + actionable CTA (Add first item / Connect account); use illustration
Don't: Show blank screen; show technical error message (No rows returned); no recovery path

Keywords: error, retry, failed, widget error, boundary
Description: Per-widget error display with retry button (not full-screen crash)
Layout Pattern: Replaces individual widget content on failure; other widgets keep working
Do: Show what went wrong briefly; include Retry button; wrap each widget in ErrorBoundary
Don't: Let one widget failure crash entire dashboard; show raw error stack; no retry option

Keywords: toast, snackbar, notification, feedback, transient, message
Description: Transient success/error/info feedback message that auto-dismisses
Layout Pattern: Bottom of screen above tab bar; overlays dashboard content
Do: Auto-dismiss in 3-5s; include action button for undo; use semantic colors
Don't: Block UI while showing toast; stack multiple toasts; show for less than 2s

Keywords: dialog, confirm, destructive, modal, alert, confirmation
Description: Confirmation modal for destructive or important actions
Layout Pattern: Centered overlay triggered by action button
Do: Use red/destructive color for dangerous action button; include Cancel; clear consequence description
Don't: Confirm non-destructive actions (unnecessary friction); auto-dismiss without user input
Tamagui: Dialog + Dialog.Portal + Dialog.Overlay + Dialog.Content + Dialog.Title + Dialog.Description + Dialog.Close

Keywords: fab, floating action, quick action, add, create, primary action
Description: Floating action button for primary dashboard action (add/create/trade)
Layout Pattern: Bottom-right corner; above tab bar with safe area offset
Do: One primary action only; use consistent position; hide on scroll down / show on scroll up
Don't: Multiple FABs; place in content flow (it should float); change position per screen
Tamagui: Button (circular size="$5" elevate icon={PlusIcon} position="absolute" bottom={80} right={16})
Paper: FAB (icon="plus" onPress size="medium" variant="primary" style={position absolute})

Keywords: tooltip, info, contextual, long-press, hint, popover
Description: Contextual information popup on long-press or hover
Layout Pattern: Appears near trigger element; overlays dashboard content
Do: Show on long-press (300ms); dismiss on tap-away; max 2 lines of text; position auto-flip
Don't: Show tooltip on every element (overwhelming); block interaction below tooltip

Keywords: action sheet, options, bottom picker, context menu, multi-option
Description: Bottom sheet with list of action options for contextual menus
Layout Pattern: Triggered by long-press on card or overflow menu button
Do: Group related actions; use icons + labels; destructive actions at bottom in red; include Cancel
Don't: Mix navigation and actions; use more than 6 options (use full sheet instead); no cancel option
Tamagui: Sheet (modal snapPoints={[50]}) + YStack of Pressable items with icons
